---
title: "Slantwise Disengagement: Explaining Facebook Users' Acts Beyond Resistance/Internalization of Domination Binary"
author: "Papa, V., and Kouros, Th."
date: 2024-01-01
description: "Convergence: The International Journal into New Media Technologies. doi: 10.1177/13548565241227396"
categories: [Media and Social Media Monitoring]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
